| 83 | How support works: I'm available through multiple channels because transformation doesn't happen on a schedule. | 6 | Personal Story | Story | Real breakthrough moments often happen between sessions, which is why you have Voxer access and community support. I'm here when you need me, not just during scheduled calls. |
| 84 | The psychology of payment: when you invest significantly, you show up differently than when you get something for free. | 6 | Cross-Domain Reference | Post | Your level of investment determines your level of commitment. When you have skin in the game, you do the work. When it's free, you treat it like it's free. |
| 85 | Complexity is the enemy — I'll give you the simplest path to the results you want, not the most complicated one. | 6 | Universal Analogy | Reel | Most coaches overcomplicate things to justify their fees. I simplify things because simple systems get implemented, and implementation gets results. |
| 86 | Use your resources before asking for help — I'll teach you to be resourceful, not dependent. | 6 | Authority Reference | Carousel | Part of becoming sovereign is learning to trust your own inner wisdom. I'll guide you to your own answers, not give you mine. |
| 87 | Asking for help is strength, not weakness — the most successful women have coaches and mentors. | 6 | Cross-Domain Reference | Story | Every elite athlete has a coach, every successful entrepreneur has mentors. The idea that you should figure it out alone is keeping you small. |
| 88 | What I bring: the proven system and expert guidance. What you bring: the commitment and willingness to change. | 6 | Personal Story | Post | This is a partnership, not a magic pill. I can't want your transformation more than you do, but if you're fully committed, I'll give you everything you need to succeed. |
| 89 | You own your results, I own the framework — success is a collaboration between your commitment and my expertise. | 6 | Universal Story | Reel | I can't make you successful, but I can give you the exact roadmap that's worked for 180+ other women. Your results are up to you. |

### H. Supporting Mechanisms (4 angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Target Belief (1-6) | Evidence Type | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 90 | Stephen Covey's "sharpening the saw" principle applies perfectly here — taking time to maintain your tools makes every other task more efficient. | 3 | Authority Reference | Post | Your nervous system and identity are your most important business tools. The time you "invest" in inner work pays dividends in every business decision you make. |
| 91 | It's like refusing to fix your car's engine because the repair costs $2,000, so instead you spend $300/month on taxis and rental cars. | 4 | Universal Analogy | Reel | After a year, you've spent more than the repair would have cost, and you still don't have a working car. Addressing root patterns is the engine repair — everything else is expensive temporary solutions. |
| 92 | Take this quick assessment: How many hours did you work last week? How much did you make per hour? How does that compare to your ideal? | 2 | Interactive Tool | Carousel | Most high-achieving women are shocked when they calculate their actual hourly rate. This simple math reveals why working harder isn't the solution — working smarter is. |
| 93 | "This won't work for me because my situation is different" — every woman thinks her patterns are unique until she realizes they're universal. | 5 | Skepticism Addressing | Story | The details of your story are unique, but the underlying patterns of self-worth tied to productivity are the same for every high-achieving woman. The solution works because the problem is universal. |

---

## SECTION 2: BOTTOM OF FUNNEL (BOF) — 15+ Angles

### A. About the Program (5+ angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 94 | Inside The Sovereign CEO: 6 months of weekly 1-on-1 sessions, monthly group calls, Voxer access, and quarterly retreats. | Carousel | Break down exactly what clients get and how each component serves their transformation. Show the comprehensive support system that makes results inevitable. |
| 95 | A day in the life of a Sovereign CEO client: morning somatic practice, business decisions from groundedness, boundaries that clients respect. | Story | Paint the picture of what daily life looks like when you're operating from sovereignty instead of self-abandonment. Make it tangible and desirable. |
| 96 | What happens by week 4: clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment, usually a full day off without guilt. | Post | Explain why this first breakthrough matters and what it signals about the deeper transformation happening. Connect it to the business results that follow. |
| 97 | Client onboarding: we start with a deep dive into your patterns, then create your personalized Sovereignty Stack roadmap. | Reel | Walk through the first month experience so prospects know exactly what to expect. Remove the mystery and increase confidence in the process. |
| 98 | The three phases explained: Excavate (uncover patterns), Integrate (regulate nervous system), Embody (apply to business decisions). | Carousel | Show how each phase builds on the previous one and why you can't skip steps. Help them understand the logic of the transformation process. |

### B. Results & Performance (5+ angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 99 | Case study deep dive: How Priya went from $180K and burnt out to $420K with half the workload in 7 months. | Story | Walk through her complete transformation journey, including the specific moments of breakthrough and how they translated to business results. Show the before, during, and after. |
| 100 | The data: 28 out of 40 clients achieved meaningful transformation, with measurable shifts starting by week 4. | Post | Present the success rate honestly and explain what "meaningful transformation" looks like in concrete terms. Address what happens to the clients who don't succeed. |
| 101 | Client journey map: Month 1 (pattern recognition), Month 3 (nervous system shifts), Month 6 (business transformation). | Carousel | Show the predictable progression of transformation so prospects can envision their own journey. Help them understand the timeline and milestones. |
| 102 | Before and after: The Half-Price Hustler vs The Sovereign CEO — a side-by-side comparison of daily life. | Reel | Contrast the two identities in specific, tangible ways that prospects can relate to. Make the transformation feel real and achievable. |
| 103 | ROI breakdown: How a $18,000 investment becomes exponential returns through pricing confidence and efficiency gains. | Post | Show the math of transformation without inventing specific numbers. Focus on the principles of ROI in identity work versus tactical business investments. |

### C. The Offer (5+ angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|
| 104 | Investment breakdown: $18,000 for 6 months or 6 monthly payments of $3,200 — here's why it's priced this way. | Carousel | Explain the value behind the pricing and why premium transformation requires premium investment. Compare to alternatives and show the cost of inaction. |
| 105 | Who this is for: Female founders making $150K-$500K who feel trapped by their own success and ready to do deep work. | Post | Get specific about the ideal client profile and help prospects self-select in or out. Address the readiness factor that determines success. |
| 106 | How this compares to therapy, business coaching, and masterminds — and why it's different from all three. | Reel | Position The Sovereign CEO as a unique category that addresses what other modalities miss. Show why the integration approach is necessary. |
| 107 | Frequently asked questions: "Is this therapy?" "Will it work for my industry?" "What if I don't have time?" | Story | Address the most common objections and concerns with honest, direct answers. Remove barriers to enrollment by providing clarity. |
| 108 | The guarantee: 60 days to feel a meaningful shift or full refund — here's why I can offer this confidently. | Post | Explain the guarantee terms and what "meaningful shift" means. Show confidence in the process while setting realistic expectations. |

---

## SECTION 3: YOUTUBE LONG-FORM SCRIPTS (10 titles + outlines)

### Video 1
**Title:** "Why Female Founders Hit Income Ceilings (And It's Not What You Think)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to break through your income ceiling without working more hours so you can scale your revenue and feel spacious instead of overwhelmed."
**Target Belief:** #2 (The Real Problem)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You think you need better marketing when the real problem is self-worth tied to productivity
2. New Belief: Income ceilings are nervous system ceilings — your body won't let you receive what your mind doesn't believe you deserve
3. Proof: Priya's story + the neuroscience of receiving + why tactics fail without identity work
**CTA:** Book a discovery call to map your specific patterns

### Video 2
**Title:** "The $8,000/Month Cost of Underpricing (And How to Stop)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to charge premium prices without guilt so you can increase your income and feel proud of your worth."
**Target Belief:** #4 (Money Allocation)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You think investing in yourself is expensive when underpricing costs you multiples more
2. New Belief: The cost of staying stuck compounds monthly — every month you delay costs you ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone
3. Proof: Real client numbers + compound effect math + why premium pricing requires premium self-worth
**CTA:** Calculate your own cost of inaction and book a call

### Video 3
**Title:** "Why Business Tactics Don't Work (The Nervous System Truth)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to regulate your nervous system for business success so you can implement strategies consistently and feel grounded in your decisions."
**Target Belief:** #1 (Core Belief)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You keep trying new tactics when your dysregulated nervous system is sabotaging implementation
2. New Belief: The Sovereignty Stack addresses identity, nervous system, and business systems as one integrated whole
3. Proof: Bessel van der Kolk's research + client transformations + why integration works when tactics fail
**CTA:** Take the Sovereign CEO Audit to assess your patterns

### Video 4
**Title:** "The Half-Price Hustler vs The Sovereign CEO (Identity Transformation)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to become The Sovereign CEO without sacrificing your income so you can lead from fullness and feel self-trusting."
**Target Belief:** #1 (Core Belief)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You're trying to add sovereign behaviors to a hustler identity — it doesn't work
2. New Belief: Identity transformation requires killing the old self so the new self can be born
3. Proof: My own transformation story + client examples + why addition doesn't work, only subtraction
**CTA:** Book a call to map your identity transformation journey

### Video 5
**Title:** "Why You Don't Have Time for Inner Work (And Why That's Exactly Why You Need It)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to prioritize inner work without sacrificing business growth so you can get your time back and feel spacious."
**Target Belief:** #3 (Time Priority)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You think inner work takes time away from business when lack of inner work is why you have no time
2. New Belief: Inner work IS business work at the highest level — it's the foundation that makes everything else efficient
3. Proof: Stephen Covey's "sharpening the saw" + client time ROI + why 30 minutes of regulation prevents hours of reactivity
**CTA:** Block time for the discovery call like you would for your most important client

### Video 6
**Title:** "The Coaching Industry Lie That's Keeping You Stuck"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to get real transformation instead of more information so you can actually change your results and feel sovereign."
**Target Belief:** #5 (Method Effectiveness)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: The industry sells tactics because they're easier to package than transformation
2. New Belief: Most business problems are nervous system problems in disguise — you need integration, not information
3. Proof: Why courses fail + the difference between knowledge and capacity + client success stories
**CTA:** Stop collecting information and start your transformation journey

### Video 7
**Title:** "How I Went From $400K and Miserable to Sovereign and Free"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to build success without self-abandonment so you can have both wealth and wellbeing and feel proud of your choices."
**Target Belief:** #6 (Help & Support)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: I thought I could figure out the identity and nervous system work alone
2. New Belief: Some problems require expert guidance — trying to transform yourself without support is inefficient and dangerous
3. Proof: My journey from corporate to consulting to coaching + what changed when I got proper guidance + why expertise matters
**CTA:** Don't spend years figuring out what I can teach you in months

### Video 8
**Title:** "The Real Reason You Can't Charge What You're Worth"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to price from self-worth instead of fear so you can increase your rates and feel confident in your value."
**Target Belief:** #2 (The Real Problem)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You think pricing is about market research when it's about self-worth
2. New Belief: Your relationship with money is your relationship with yourself — if you think you're too expensive, so will everyone else
3. Proof: Pricing psychology + client transformations + why premium pricing requires premium self-worth
**CTA:** Book a call to address your pricing blocks at the root

### Video 9
**Title:** "Why Smart Women Stay Stuck (The Intelligence Trap)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to use your intelligence for transformation instead of analysis paralysis so you can make fast decisions and feel confident."
**Target Belief:** #6 (Help & Support)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You think being smart means you should figure everything out alone
2. New Belief: Intelligence means recognizing when you need expert guidance and getting it quickly
3. Proof: Why smart people often struggle most + the difference between knowledge and wisdom + client examples
**CTA:** Use your intelligence to make the smart choice — get expert help

### Video 10
**Title:** "The 6-Month Transformation Timeline (What to Expect)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how transformation actually happens so you can set realistic expectations and feel prepared for the journey."
**Target Belief:** #1 (Core Belief)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. Problem: You expect overnight transformation and get discouraged when it takes time
2. New Belief: Real transformation follows predictable phases — excavate, integrate, embody
3. Proof: Client journey maps + why each phase matters + what by the end of week 4 — clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment, usually a full day off without guilt looks like
**CTA:** Start your 6-month transformation journey today

---

## SECTION 4: SHORT-FORM HOOKS (20 scroll-stopping hooks)

| # | Hook | Target Belief |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Your clients are a mirror of your standards — if they're broke and boundary-pushing, look in the mirror. | 2 |
| 2 | You're not stuck because you don't know what to do — you're stuck because your identity won't let you do it. | 2 |
| 3 | Every month you stay The Half-Price Hustler costs you ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone. | 4 |
| 4 | Millionaire female founders check their numbers daily — broke ones check their Instagram stories. | 1 |
| 5 | If you hesitate to invest $18,000 in yourself, don't expect clients to invest $18,000 in you. | 4 |
| 6 | You can't strategy your way out of a nervous system problem. | 1 |
| 7 | Comfort is the enemy of growth — if your business feels easy, you're not growing. | 1 |
| 8 | The speed of your decisions separates you from your competition. | 6 |
| 9 | You become who you spend time with — choose your circle wisely. | 1 |
| 10 | Your relationship with money is your relationship with yourself. | 2 |
| 11 | Procrastination isn't about time management — it's about identity protection. | 2 |
| 12 | Premium pricing requires premium self-worth — work on yourself first. | 2 |
| 13 | What takes ___ alone takes 6 months with expert guidance. | 6 |
| 14 | You don't have a marketing problem — you have a self-worth problem. | 2 |
| 15 | Inner work isn't separate from business work — it IS the most important business work. | 3 |
| 16 | Confused prospects don't buy — if you can't explain your value, neither can your clients. | 2 |
| 17 | The women who transform fastest make decisions from intuition, not analysis paralysis. | 6 |
| 18 | You can't become The Sovereign CEO by adding habits to The Half-Price Hustler. | 1 |
| 19 | Every business coach you've hired failed because they treated symptoms, not root causes. | 5 |
| 20 | Asking for help is strength, not weakness — every successful woman has mentors. | 6 |

---

## SECTION 5: 4-WEEK CONTENT CALENDAR

### Week 1: Pattern Recognition
- **Monday:** MOF #14 (Instagram Reel) - "You don't have a marketing problem"
- **Tuesday:** Identity #11 (Facebook Post) - "Becoming The Sovereign CEO requires killing The Half-Price Hustler"
- **Wednesday:** MOF #19 (Instagram Carousel) - "Cost of staying stuck: ~$8,000/month"
- **Thursday:** BOF #99 (Instagram Story Series) - "Priya's case study deep dive"
- **Friday:** MOF #26 (Facebook Post) - "How I discovered The Sovereignty Stack"

### Week 2: Nervous System Education
- **Monday:** MOF #31 (Instagram Reel) - "Why hustle culture is broken for female founders"
- **Tuesday:** Identity #8 (Facebook Post) - "Time allocation reveals real priorities"
- **Wednesday:** MOF #36 (Instagram Carousel) - "Live demonstration of IFS work"
- **Thursday:** BOF #104 (Instagram Story) - "Investment breakdown and pricing explanation"
- **Friday:** MOF #58 (Facebook Post) - "Every month you hesitate costs you"

### Week 3: Solution Introduction
- **Monday:** MOF #25 (Instagram Reel) - "Old way vs new way comparison"
- **Tuesday:** Identity #2 (Facebook Post) - "Sales behavior mirroring buying behavior"
- **Wednesday:** MOF #33 (Instagram Carousel) - "What happens in first 4 weeks"
- **Thursday:** BOF #105 (Instagram Story) - "Who this program is for"
- **Friday:** MOF #72 (Facebook Post) - "Expert guidance vs figuring it out alone"

### Week 4: Transformation & Invitation
- **Monday:** MOF #39 (Instagram Reel) - "What life looks like after 6 months"
- **Tuesday:** Identity #13 (Facebook Post) - "Decision speed separates top performers"
- **Wednesday:** MOF #51 (Instagram Carousel) - "Client testimonial spotlight"
- **Thursday:** BOF #107 (Instagram Story Series) - "FAQ addressing common objections"
- **Friday:** MOF #65 (Facebook Post) - "Every action toward sovereignty is an identity upgrade"

**Content Mix Per Week:**
- 2 MOF belief-shift pieces (core transformation content)
- 1 Identity/lifestyle piece (aspirational content)
- 1 Proof/results piece (social proof and credibility)
- 1 BOF/offer piece (program information and invitation)

**Platform Strategy:**
- Instagram: Visual storytelling, reels for engagement, carousels for education
- Facebook: Longer-form posts for deeper connection, detailed explanations
- Stories: Behind-the-scenes, FAQ, real-time engagement

This content library provides 108+ unique angles that systematically move prospects through the belief transformation journey from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO, with each piece designed to shift specific limiting beliefs while building authority and trust.

business-abstract.content:
# GHL Chat/SMS Automation Sequence for Sarah Chen — Unbound Leadership

---

#### STEP 1: Initial Response to DM Keyword

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact sends DM with keyword "SOVEREIGN" to Instagram account

**Time Delay:** None (immediate response)

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds with any message: → Go to Step 2
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 8 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: lead-source-instagram] | [+Add: sovereign-keyword]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: new-lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey! I saw you're interested in building a sovereign business 👑

Quick question — are you currently making $150K+ annually but feeling trapped by your own success? Working weekends, underpricing, can't seem to break through to the next level?

If yes, I've got something that might help. But first, I need to make sure we're a good fit.

Can you tell me: What's your current annual revenue range?
A) $150K-$300K
B) $300K-$500K  
C) Over $500K
D) Under $150K

---

#### STEP 2: Revenue Qualification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with A, B, C, or D to revenue question

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF replies A or B: → Go to Step 3
> - IF replies C: → Go to Step 3  
> - IF replies D: → Go to Step 9 (Not Qualified - Redirect to Lead Magnet)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: revenue-qualified] (for A, B, C) | [+Add: revenue-not-qualified] (for D)
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: qualified-lead] (for A, B, C)

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Next question:

How long have you been stuck at roughly this income level, despite working harder and trying different strategies?

A) 6-___
B) 1-2 years
C) 2-4 years
D) Over 4 years

---

#### STEP 3: Stuck Duration Qualification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with A, B, C, or D to stuck duration question

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF replies B, C, or D: → Go to Step 4
> - IF replies A: → Go to Step 10 (Too Early - Nurture Sequence)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: stuck-duration-qualified] (for B, C, D) | [+Add: too-early] (for A)

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Got it. Here's the real question:

On a scale of 1-10, how ready are you to invest in addressing the ROOT CAUSE (identity and nervous system patterns) rather than just learning more tactics?

1-3: Still think I need better marketing
4-6: Open to it but skeptical
7-8: Ready to go deeper
9-10: Desperate for real change

---

#### STEP 4: Readiness Assessment

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with number 1-10 for readiness

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF replies 7, 8, 9, or 10: → Go to Step 5
> - IF replies 4, 5, or 6: → Go to Step 11 (Education Sequence)
> - IF replies 1, 2, or 3: → Go to Step 12 (Not Ready - Lead Magnet)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: high-readiness] (for 7-10) | [+Add: medium-readiness] (for 4-6) | [+Add: low-readiness] (for 1-3)

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Last question:

The Sovereign CEO program is $18,000 for 6 months of deep transformation work. This isn't about quick fixes — it's about rewiring the patterns that keep you stuck.

Are you financially able to make this level of investment in yourself right now?

A) Yes, if it's the right fit
B) I'd need to see payment plans
C) That's outside my budget currently

---

#### STEP 5: Investment Qualification

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with A, B, or C to investment question

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF replies A or B: → Go to Step 6
> - IF replies C: → Go to Step 13 (Budget Objection Handling)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: investment-qualified] (for A, B) | [+Add: budget-concern] (for C)
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: sales-qualified] (for A, B)

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Based on your answers, you're exactly who this program was designed for.

Here's what I see: You're making good money but working too hard for it. You've been stuck at this level for years despite trying everything. And you're ready to address the real issue — the inner patterns that keep you trapped in self-abandonment.

I'd love to have a real conversation about your specific situation and see if The Sovereign CEO is the right fit.

I have a few discovery call spots open this week. These are 45-minute strategy sessions where we'll:

✓ Map out your specific patterns keeping you stuck
✓ Show you exactly how The Sovereignty Stack would work for your situation  
✓ See if we're a mutual fit

No pressure, no hard sell. Just an honest conversation.

Ready to book?

---

#### STEP 6: Discovery Call Booking

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies positively to booking invitation

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact books call: → Go to Step 7
> - IF no booking after 2 hours: → Go to Step 14 (Booking Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-booking-sent]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Amazing! Here's your private booking link:

[CALENDAR LINK]

A few things before we talk:

1. Block 45 minutes of uninterrupted time
2. Be somewhere you can speak freely about your business challenges
3. Come ready to be honest about what's really not working

I'll send you a quick prep form after you book so we can dive right into your specific situation.

Looking forward to our conversation!

P.S. — If you book within the next 48 hours, I'll include a bonus 1-hour intensive on pricing psychology (normally $___). This offer expires when your call starts.

---

#### STEP 7: Post-Booking Confirmation

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact books discovery call through calendar link

**Time Delay:** Wait 5 minutes

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-booked] | [+Add: fast-action-bonus-eligible]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: call-scheduled]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect! Your call is confirmed 🎉

I just sent the prep form to your email. Please fill it out at least 2 hours before our call — it helps me understand your specific situation so we can use our time strategically.

Since you booked within 48 hours, you've locked in the bonus pricing psychology intensive (worth $___). We'll discuss this during our call.

Quick reminder: This isn't a pitch call. It's a strategy session. Come prepared to get real value whether we work together or not.

See you soon!

---

#### STEP 8: 24-Hour Re-engagement

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response after 24 hours from Step 1

**Time Delay:** Wait 24 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Go to Step 2
> - IF no response after 48 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Lead Magnet Offer)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: re-engagement-1]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey! I know Instagram can be overwhelming with messages...

You showed interest in building a sovereign business, so I wanted to make sure you saw this.

Most female founders I work with are making $150K-$500K but feel completely trapped by their own success. Working 70-hour weeks, charging half what they're worth, can't take a day off without guilt.

Sound familiar?

If so, I've got something that can help. But first — what's your current annual revenue? Just curious if we're in the right ballpark.

---

#### STEP 9: Not Revenue Qualified - Lead Magnet Redirect

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replied "D" (Under $150K) to revenue question

**Time Delay:** None

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: below-revenue-threshold]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: nurture-lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Thanks for being honest! You're building something great.

The Sovereign CEO program is designed for founders already at $150K+ who are hitting identity-level barriers to scaling.

But I've got something perfect for where you are right now:

The Sovereign CEO Audit — a free assessment that shows you exactly which patterns might limit your growth as you scale.

It takes 5 minutes and gives you a personalized roadmap for building sustainable success from day one.

Want the link? 

[https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

---

#### STEP 10: Too Early - Nurture Sequence

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replied "A" (6-___ stuck) to duration question

**Time Delay:** None

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: too-early-for-program]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: nurture-lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I appreciate your honesty! 

6-___ at your current level isn't necessarily a problem — sometimes that's just natural business evolution.

The Sovereign CEO program works best for founders who've been stuck for 2+ years despite trying multiple strategies. That's when we know it's an identity/nervous system issue, not just a timing or strategy issue.

For now, I'd recommend taking The Sovereign CEO Audit. It'll help you identify any early patterns that could become barriers as you scale:

[https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

Keep building, and feel free to reach out when you've been at this level longer and are ready for deeper work.

---

#### STEP 11: Education Sequence (Medium Readiness)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replied 4, 5, or 6 to readiness question

**Time Delay:** None

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: needs-education]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I get it. You've probably been burned by "mindset coaches" who told you to just think positive while your business was falling apart.

This isn't that.

This is about the concrete, measurable impact of nervous system dysregulation on your business decisions. When you're operating from fight-or-flight, you literally cannot access the parts of your brain that make strategic decisions.

That's not woo — that's neuroscience.

Here's what I mean: You know you should charge more, but every time you try, you feel physically sick. That's not a strategy problem. That's a nervous system problem.

Want to see exactly which patterns might be running your business decisions?

Take The Sovereign CEO Audit: [https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

It's free and shows you the specific identity/nervous system patterns that create income ceilings.

---

#### STEP 12: Not Ready - Lead Magnet

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replied 1, 2, or 3 to readiness question

**Time Delay:** None

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: not-ready-for-inner-work]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: nurture-lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

No worries! You're not alone in thinking tactics are the answer.

Most successful founders try the strategy route first. I did too — spent years optimizing funnels and systems while working 70-hour weeks.

When you're ready to explore why the tactics aren't sticking, I'll be here.

For now, grab The Sovereign CEO Audit. It's tactical enough to feel safe, but it'll show you exactly why you might be hitting walls:

[https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

No pressure. Build your business your way. 

Just know that the door's always open when you're ready to go deeper.

---

#### STEP 13: Budget Objection Handling

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replied "C" (outside budget) to investment question

**Time Delay:** None

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: budget-objection]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I totally understand. $18,000 feels like a lot when you're already feeling stretched.

But here's what I want you to consider:

You're losing ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone. That's $___per year you're leaving on the table because you can't charge what you're worth.

The program pays for itself in less than 3 months just from pricing confidence.

Plus, you're spending 15-20 hours/week trapped in client work that should be delegated. What's your time worth? Even at $100/hour, that's $___-$___annually in opportunity cost.

The real question isn't whether you can afford this program. It's whether you can afford to stay stuck.

That said, I never want money to be the reason someone doesn't get help.

Want to take The Sovereign CEO Audit first? It's free and will show you exactly how much your current patterns are costing you:

[https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

---

#### STEP 14: Booking Follow-up

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact expressed interest in booking but didn't book within 2 hours

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 hours

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: booking-hesitation]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey! I noticed you were interested in the discovery call but haven't booked yet.

I get it — sometimes these decisions need to marinate.

Just a heads up: I only have a few spots left this week, and the 48-hour bonus expires when your call starts (if you book one).

No pressure though. If you're not ready, you're not ready.

But if you're just overthinking it (which every high-achiever does), remember: this is a strategy session, not a sales call. You'll get value whether we work together or not.

Calendar link is still here when you're ready: [CALENDAR LINK]

---

#### STEP 15: Final Lead Magnet Offer

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response after 48 hours from re-engagement attempt

**Time Delay:** Wait 48 hours

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: final-touchpoint]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: cold-lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Last message from me!

I know you're busy building your business. I respect that.

If you ever want to understand why you might be hitting income ceilings or working harder than you need to, I created something for you:

The Sovereign CEO Audit — 5 minutes, completely free, shows you exactly which patterns might be limiting your growth.

No opt-in required. No sales pitch. Just insights.

[https://unboundleadership.co/audit]

Keep building something amazing 🚀

---

### AUTOMATION SETTINGS

**Global Settings:**
- **Business Hours:** Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST
- **Weekend Behavior:** Queue messages for Monday delivery
- **Response Window:** Mark as "no response" after 72 hours of inactivity
- **Unsubscribe Trigger:** If contact replies "STOP" or "UNSUBSCRIBE"

**Lead Scoring:**
- Revenue Qualified: +10 points
- High Readiness (7-10): +15 points  
- Investment Qualified: +20 points
- Call Booked: +25 points

**Pipeline Stages:**
1. New Lead
2. Qualified Lead  
3. Sales Qualified
4. Call Scheduled
5. Nurture Lead
6. Cold Lead

**Required Integrations:**
- Calendar booking system
- Email automation for prep forms
- Lead magnet delivery system
- CRM pipeline management

# ManyChat DM Automation Flow for Sarah Chen — Unbound Leadership

---

## FLOW 1: DM KEYWORD TRIGGER + WELCOME/QUALIFICATION

---
#### NODE: Keyword Trigger Response
- **Trigger:** DM keyword "SOVEREIGN" or comment "SOVEREIGN" on post
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+DM-Lead]
- **Custom Fields:** [lead_source = dm-keyword]

**Message:**
> Hey! Thanks for reaching out about The Sovereign CEO.
> 
> Before I share the details, I want to make sure it's actually the right fit for you.
> 
> Most female founders I work with are making good money but feel trapped by their own success. Sound familiar?

| Button Label | Action | Connects To |

| Button Label | Action | Connects To |

**Next Step:** 
- IF "Yes, ready" OR "Need to know more" → Offer Delivery
- IF "Not right now" → Nurture Entry

## FLOW 2: OFFER DELIVERY + SALES CONVERSION

---
#### NODE: Offer Delivery
- **Trigger:** Qualified from router

> • 6-month program to break income ceilings without burnout
> • Weekly 1-on-1s + monthly group calls + Voxer support
> • The Sovereignty Stack: IFS + somatic work + business systems
> • First win by week 4 - clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment, usually a full day off without guilt
> 
> Investment: $18,000 (or 6 payments of $3,200)
> 60-day guarantee if you don't feel a meaningful shift.

- **Trigger:** 24 hours from Day 2

business-abstract.content:
# 20 Facebook Posts for Sarah Chen — Unbound Leadership

## Post 1 — VALUE POST (TOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — broad business audience

Here's the uncomfortable truth about pricing that no one wants to tell you:

Your pricing struggles aren't about market research or competitor analysis.

They're about whether you believe you deserve to be well-compensated for your gifts.

I see this with every female founder I work with. They can analyze their market all day, but when it comes time to have the pricing conversation, their nervous system goes into fight-or-flight.

Because pricing isn't a business decision — it's an identity decision.

When you know you're worth it, the conversation becomes easy. When you don't, no amount of market research will help.

Try this today: Before your next pricing conversation, ask yourself "What would I charge if I knew I was already enough?"

Then charge that.

What's been your biggest pricing block?

---

## Post 2 — STORY POST (MOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders audience

At 33, I had what everyone called a "successful" consulting business.

$400K in revenue. Great clients. All the external markers of success.

But I was working 70-hour weeks, drinking wine just to fall asleep, and silently resenting every client who asked for another revision.

I felt trapped by my own achievement.

Then my therapist asked me a question that changed everything:

"What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I didn't have an answer. And that terrified me.

Because I realized I'd built my entire business on proving my worth instead of expressing it.

That question led me to 2 years of deep inner work, getting ICF-certified, and eventually pivoting to coaching women through the exact patterns I'd been stuck in.

Sometimes the most successful-looking businesses are prisons built with our own hands.

If you're making good money but feeling trapped, you're not broken.

You're just ready for the next level of success — one built on self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

---

## Post 3 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #2
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders who've tried business coaching

You don't have a marketing problem.

You have a self-worth problem disguised as a marketing problem.

Here's how I know:

You can create the perfect funnel, write compelling copy, and have a solid strategy — but if deep down you don't believe you're worth premium prices, you'll sabotage every sales conversation.

You'll discount before they ask.
You'll over-deliver to "prove" your value.
You'll apologize for your prices.

It's like trying to drive a Ferrari with the parking brake on. You can rev the engine all you want, but until you release the brake, you're not going anywhere.

The brake is your relationship with your own worth.

Marketing becomes effortless when you're not trying to convince anyone of something you don't believe yourself.

The best marketing strategy is unshakeable self-worth.

What would change in your business if you truly believed you were worth premium prices?

---

## Post 4 — RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — warm audience who's engaged with content

Meet Priya.

Marketing agency founder. Making $180K but completely burnt out. Working weekends. Charging half of what her competitors charged.

She thought she needed better marketing tactics.

But the real problem? Her self-worth was tied to productivity, creating patterns she couldn't see.

After 6 months in The Sovereign CEO program, here's what happened:

✓ Tripled her prices without losing clients
✓ Dropped 70% of her client load  
✓ Scaled to $420K annually
✓ Now works half as much

Her words: "I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth."

This transformation happened because we addressed the root cause — her identity and nervous system patterns — not just the surface-level symptoms.

When you change how you see yourself, everything else changes too.

The tactics stay the same. The person implementing them becomes different.

---

## Post 5 — CTA POST (BOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — highly engaged audience

There are two types of female founders making multiple six figures:

Those who feel trapped by their own success...

And those who feel liberated by it.

The difference isn't talent, market conditions, or luck.

It's whether they're running their business from self-trust or self-abandonment.

The Half-Price Hustler: Works 70-hour weeks, charges half what competitors charge, feels resentful and exhausted.

The Sovereign CEO: Makes premium pricing decisions from confidence, takes real time off, leads from fullness.

If you're ready to stop being The Half-Price Hustler and become The Sovereign CEO, I can help.

But this isn't for everyone.

This is for you if:
→ You're making $150K-$500K but feel like your business owns you
→ You recognize that your income ceiling isn't about strategy — it's about the stories you tell yourself
→ You're ready to do the deeper work of rewiring your nervous system and relationship with success

DM me "SOVEREIGN" to get the details.

---

## Post 6 — VALUE POST (TOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — broad business audience

Your clients are a mirror of your standards.

If they're pushing boundaries, demanding revisions at 10pm, and negotiating your prices down...

Look in the mirror.

The clients who drain you most are reflecting back your own relationship with boundaries.

When you start honoring your own time and energy, you'll attract clients who do the same.

When you charge premium prices confidently, you'll attract clients who pay premium prices gratefully.

When you set clear boundaries, you'll attract clients who respect boundaries.

This isn't about being difficult or demanding.

It's about teaching people how to treat you through how you treat yourself.

Try this today: Look at your most challenging client relationship and ask "How is this reflecting my own patterns?"

Then change the pattern in yourself first.

What boundary do you need to set with yourself before you can set it with others?

---

## Post 7 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #3
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders audience

"I don't have time for inner work — I should spend my time on marketing and client delivery."

This is exactly why you need inner work.

You don't have time because you're trapped in patterns that keep you busy but not productive.

You're working 15-20 hours a week on client work that should be delegated.
You're answering emails at 10pm because you can't set boundaries.
You're saying yes to every client request to avoid conflict.

It's like refusing to sharpen your saw because you're "too busy" cutting down trees.

The 30 minutes you spend regulating your nervous system prevents hours of reactive decision-making.

The hour you spend in IFS work prevents days of people-pleasing patterns.

The time you "invest" in inner work pays dividends in every business decision you make.

Inner work isn't separate from business work — it IS the most important business work.

Your nervous system and identity are your most important business tools.

What would happen if you protected your inner work time like you protect your most important client calls?

---

## Post 8 — STORY POST (MOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders who've struggled with burnout

I used to think "self-care" was bubble baths and face masks.

Then I realized self-care is actually saying no to client requests that drain your energy.

Self-care is charging what you're worth instead of discounting to avoid discomfort.

Self-care is taking a full day off without checking email 47 times.

Self-care is building a business that serves you instead of one that consumes you.

When I was making $400K in consulting but drinking wine every night to fall asleep, I thought the problem was that I needed better time management.

The real problem was that I'd built a business model that required self-abandonment to succeed.

No amount of bubble baths could fix that.

Real self-care is designing your business around your nervous system, not against it.

It's creating systems that honor your energy instead of deplete it.

It's becoming The Sovereign CEO who leads from fullness, not emptiness.

What would real self-care look like in your business?

---

## Post 9 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #4
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders considering investment

If you hesitate to invest $18,000 in your business transformation, don't expect your clients to invest $18,000 with you.

Your sales behavior mirrors your buying behavior.

If you agonize over investments, your clients will too.
If you need to "think about it" for weeks, so will they.
If you focus on price instead of value, they'll do the same.

The energy you bring to money decisions is exactly what you're teaching your prospects to do.

Here's the math that changed my perspective:

Every month I stayed stuck cost me ~$8,000 in underpricing alone.

That's $___per year of lost income from one pattern.

The $18,000 investment in transformation paid for itself in less than 3 months.

But here's what really matters: the identity shift that allowed me to receive that money.

When you invest significantly in yourself, you show the universe (and your nervous system) that you're worth investing in.

Premium investment creates premium self-worth, which creates premium pricing confidence.

What would change if you invested in yourself the way you want your clients to invest in you?

---

## Post 10 — POLARIZING/FILTER POST (TOF)
**Retargeting:** N — organic reach only

Unpopular opinion: The hustle culture is killing female founders.

And most of you are addicted to it.

You wear your 70-hour weeks like a badge of honor.
You brag about answering emails at midnight.
You think taking a day off means you're "not committed."

This isn't dedication — it's trauma dressed up as ambition.

The women making real money? They work ___ a week and take full months off.

They charge premium prices and their clients thank them for it.

They've built businesses that serve them, not consume them.

If you think this sounds "unrealistic" or "privileged," this content isn't for you.

Keep grinding. Keep hustling. Keep proving your worth through exhaustion.

But don't complain about being burnt out when you're choosing burnout over boundaries.

The Sovereign CEOs reading this know exactly what I'm talking about.

And they're ready to build something different.

---

## Post 11 — VALUE POST (TOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — broad business audience

Millionaire female founders check their numbers daily.

Broke ones check their Instagram stories.

Here's what I mean:

The Sovereign CEOs in my program track revenue, expenses, and profit margins every single day.

They know their numbers better than they know their social media metrics.

They treat their business like the asset it is, not a hobby they hope makes money.

They make decisions based on data, not feelings.

Meanwhile, struggling founders spend hours scrolling, comparing, and consuming content about success instead of creating it.

They know everyone else's business better than their own.

Try this today: Before you check social media, check your numbers.

Revenue. Expenses. Profit. Cash flow.

What gets measured gets managed.

And what gets managed gets multiplied.

How well do you know your numbers?

---

## Post 12 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #5
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders who've tried multiple programs

Every business coach you've hired failed because they treated symptoms, not root causes.

It's like going to a doctor with a broken leg and getting pain medication instead of surgery.

The pain goes away temporarily, but the bone never heals.

Business tactics are pain medication for identity problems.

You can learn all the funnels, frameworks, and strategies in the world...

But if your nervous system is dysregulated and your self-worth is tied to productivity, you'll sabotage every implementation.

This is why you keep cycling through coaches and programs without lasting change.

The Sovereignty Stack is different because it addresses the root cause:

→ IFS work integrates your internal parts so they stop fighting each other
→ Somatic regulation creates a nervous system that can handle success  
→ Business systems align your external structure with your internal capacity

When the foundation is solid, every tactic works better.

When the foundation is broken, no tactic works consistently.

What would change if you addressed the root cause instead of chasing more symptoms?

---

## Post 13 — RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — warm audience

"I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth."

Those are Priya's words after 7 months of transformation.

But here's what happened BEFORE she could say that:

Month 1: Excavated the patterns keeping her stuck (childhood programming that achievement = worthiness)

Month 3: Integrated new nervous system responses (stopped checking email compulsively, started making decisions from her body instead of anxiety)

Month 6: Embodied her new identity as The Sovereign CEO (tripled prices, dropped 70% of clients, scaled to $420K with half the workload)

The business results were just the external reflection of the internal transformation.

When you change who you are, everything else changes too.

This is what's possible when you address identity and nervous system patterns instead of just implementing tactics.

The tactics stay the same. The person implementing them becomes completely different.

---

## Post 14 — IDENTITY POST (MOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders audience

You're either becoming The Sovereign CEO or staying The Half-Price Hustler.

There's no neutral.

The Half-Price Hustler:
→ Works 70-hour weeks but can't break her income ceiling
→ Charges half what competitors charge because she doesn't believe she's worth more
→ Answers emails at 10pm and feels guilty taking time off
→ Built a business that owns her instead of serves her

The Sovereign CEO:
→ Makes premium pricing decisions from confidence, not fear
→ Takes full months off without the business collapsing  
→ Leads from fullness instead of proving her worth through exhaustion
→ Created a business that breathes with her natural rhythms

Every decision you make is a vote for one of these identities.

Every time you undercharge, you're voting for The Half-Price Hustler.
Every time you work on Sunday, you're voting for The Half-Price Hustler.
Every time you say yes when you want to say no, you're voting for The Half-Price Hustler.

But every boundary you set, every premium price you charge, every day you take off without guilt...

You're voting for The Sovereign CEO.

Which identity are your daily choices creating?

---

## Post 15 — CTA POST (BOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — highly engaged audience

I'm looking for 5 female founders who are done being The Half-Price Hustler.

Women making $150K-$500K who feel trapped by their own success.

Who recognize that their income ceiling isn't about strategy — it's about the stories they tell themselves about what they deserve.

Who are ready to do the deeper work of rewiring their nervous system and relationship with success.

The Sovereign CEO program is a 6-month transformation journey using The Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

This isn't for women looking for quick fixes or surface-level tactics.

This is for women ready to address the root cause of their patterns.

By week 4, clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment — usually a full day off without guilt.

By month 6, they're running businesses that serve them instead of consume them.

If this resonates and you're ready to invest $18,000 in becoming The Sovereign CEO...

DM me "READY" and I'll send you the details.

But only if you're serious about transformation, not just information.

---

## Post 16 — VALUE POST (TOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — broad business audience

The speed of your decisions separates you from your competition.

While they're "thinking about" raising their rates, you're implementing.

While they're researching the perfect strategy, you're taking imperfect action.

While they're waiting for the "right time," you're creating the right time.

Fast decisions create wealth. Slow decisions create poverty.

This doesn't mean being reckless — it means trusting your intuition over analysis paralysis.

Most business decisions are reversible. You can always adjust course.

But you can't adjust course if you never start moving.

The women who transform fastest in my program are the ones who make decisions from their gut, not their spreadsheets.

They know that done is better than perfect.

And perfect is the enemy of profitable.

Try this today: Make one decision you've been putting off. Set a timer for 10 minutes and decide.

Then implement immediately.

What decision have you been avoiding that you could make right now?

---

## Post 17 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #6
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders audience

"I should be able to figure this out myself — I'm smart enough."

This is exactly why smart women stay stuck the longest.

You think intelligence means you should solve every problem alone.

But here's what I know after working with 180 high-achieving women:

The smartest ones get help the fastest.

They recognize that trying to transform your own identity and nervous system without expert guidance is like trying to perform surgery on yourself.

Technically possible. Unnecessarily dangerous. Wildly inefficient.

Every elite athlete has a coach.
Every successful entrepreneur has mentors.
Every transformation requires outside perspective to see the blind spots.

Intelligence isn't about having all the answers — it's about knowing when to get help.

What takes years to figure out alone takes months with expert guidance.

The question isn't whether you're smart enough to figure it out.

The question is whether you're smart enough to recognize that some problems require expert help.

What would change if you used your intelligence to make the smart choice instead of the hard choice?

---

## Post 18 — STORY POST (MOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders who struggle with boundaries

The moment I knew everything had changed:

A client emailed me at 9pm demanding a revision on work we'd already approved.

Old me would have immediately opened my laptop and started working.

Old me would have apologized for the "inconvenience" and delivered by morning.

Old me would have resented the client while simultaneously trying to prove my worth through overdelivery.

New me read the email, felt my nervous system stay calm, and responded:

"I'll address this during business hours tomorrow."

No explanation. No apology. No guilt.

Just a clear boundary delivered from a regulated nervous system.

The client responded the next day: "Of course, thanks for the quick response."

They respected the boundary because I respected it first.

This is what sovereignty looks like in real time — making decisions from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

Your clients will treat you exactly how you teach them to treat you.

And you teach them through your own relationship with your boundaries.

What boundary do you need to set today?

---

## Post 19 — BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF) — Targets Belief #1
**Retargeting:** Y — female founders audience

You can't strategy your way out of a nervous system problem.

Here's what I mean:

You have the perfect morning routine written down, but your dysregulated nervous system won't let you implement it consistently.

You know you should charge more, but your fight-or-flight response kicks in every pricing conversation.

You want to delegate, but your anxiety convinces you that no one can do it "right."

The problem isn't your strategy. It's your nervous system.

When you're operating from chronic fight-or-flight, you literally cannot access the parts of your brain that make strategic decisions.

You're trying to build sustainable success on an unstable foundation.

The Sovereignty Stack addresses this by integrating three layers:
→ IFS parts work (resolves internal conflict)
→ Somatic regulation (calms the nervous system)  
→ Business systems (creates external structure)

When your nervous system is regulated, every strategy works better.

When it's dysregulated, no strategy works consistently.

Foundation first. Then building.

What would change if you addressed your nervous system before your strategy?

---

## Post 20 — RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Retargeting:** Y — warm audience

28 out of my last 40 clients achieved meaningful transformation.

Here's what "meaningful transformation" actually looks like:

→ First real "permission to slow down" moment by week 4 (usually a full day off without guilt)
→ Pricing conversations from confidence instead of fear
→ Business decisions made from their body instead of their anxiety  
→ Teams that handle client management while they focus on strategy
→ Revenue growth with fewer working hours

This isn't about perfection — it's about a proven system that works for the majority of women who fully engage with it.

The 12 who didn't achieve these results? They weren't ready to let The Half-Price Hustler identity die.

Transformation requires death and rebirth.

You can't become The Sovereign CEO by adding new habits to The Half-Price Hustler.

The old identity has to go.

For the women ready to make that shift, the results speak for themselves.

Which group do you want to be in?

business-abstract.content:
# Facebook/Instagram Ad Copy — Sarah Chen / Unbound Leadership

---

## **Ad 1: Problem-Aware Hook (Cold Traffic)**

### Primary Text (Short)
**"Why successful female founders secretly resent their own businesses"**

### Primary Text (Long)
**"Why successful female founders secretly resent their own businesses"**

You're making $300K+ but working 70-hour weeks.

You snap at your kids because of a client email. Your husband asks "Why are you working on Sunday again?" and you want to scream.

Here's what nobody tells you: The hustle playbook is killing a generation of female founders.

You think you need better marketing. Better systems. More discipline.

But the real problem? Your self-worth is tied to productivity. You're running a business from self-abandonment, not self-trust.

I know because I was there. At 33, I had a $420K consulting business and was drinking to sleep every night, silently resenting every client who asked for another revision.

The breakthrough came when my therapist asked: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I didn't have an answer. That terrified me.

Two years of deep inner work later, I pivoted to coaching women through the exact patterns I'd been stuck in. Now I help female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them stuck below seven figures.

If you're ready to run your business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment, take the Sovereign CEO Audit. It'll show you exactly which patterns are keeping you trapped.

**Headline:** Stop the hustle. Start leading.

**Description:** Free audit reveals your blocks

**CTA Button:** Learn More

**Suggested Visual:** Split image — exhausted woman at laptop late at night vs. confident woman in bright office space

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Cold traffic, female business owners 30-45
- Optimization: Landing page views
- Budget: $___-100/day

---

## **Ad 2: Solution-Aware Hook (Warm Traffic)**

### Primary Text (Short)
**"The real reason mindset work isn't working for you"**

### Primary Text (Long)
**"The real reason mindset work isn't working for you"**

You've read the business books. Joined the masterminds. Followed every mindset coach on Instagram.

But you're still working 15-20 hours a week on client work that should be delegated. Still charging half what your competitors charge. Still checking Slack at 10pm.

Here's why: You're trying to solve an identity problem with strategy.

The strategies work at the behavior layer. But your problem lives in your nervous system and your parts.

You don't need more tactics. You need to excavate the hidden operating system that's running your business decisions.

Most female founders hit an income ceiling not because they lack skills, but because of patterns they can't see. Patterns installed when you were eight years old and your parents drilled into you that achievement equals worthiness.

I spent 2 years in deep IFS and somatic work to break these patterns in myself. Now I help women do it in 6 months through The Sovereign CEO program.

We use the Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

The result? My client Priya tripled her prices, dropped 70% of her clients, and went from $180K to $420K in 7 months with half the workload.

Ready to become The Sovereign CEO — a woman who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment?

**Headline:** Beyond mindset to identity work

**Description:** 6-month transformation program

**CTA Button:** Apply Now

**Suggested Visual:** Woman looking in mirror with two reflections — stressed vs. confident

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Website visitors, engaged with content
- Optimization: Purchase
- Budget: $___-150/day

---

## **Ad 3: Testimonial/Case Study (Warm Traffic)**

### Primary Text (Short)
**"How Priya went from burnt out to $420K in 7 months"**

### Primary Text (Long)
**"How Priya went from burnt out to $420K in 7 months"**

Priya ran a marketing agency making $180K a year.

She was burnt out, charging half what her competitors charged, and secretly resenting every client revision request.

Sound familiar?

The problem wasn't her marketing. It wasn't her systems. It wasn't her discipline.

The problem was her inner operating system — the unconscious patterns driving every business decision.

Through The Sovereign CEO program, Priya learned to:
→ Identify the parts of her that equated worth with overwork
→ Regulate her nervous system when clients pushed boundaries  
→ Make business decisions from self-trust, not self-abandonment

The result? She tripled her prices, dropped 70% of her clients, and hit $420K in revenue — with half the workload.

"I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth," she told me.

This is what happens when you address the real problem: self-worth tied to productivity.

Most female founders think they need better marketing. What they actually need is identity work.

If you're ready to become The Sovereign CEO — a woman who leads from fullness, not depletion — The Sovereign CEO program opens quarterly.

We cap each cohort at 20 active clients. Once full, the next doors open 3 months out.

**Headline:** Real results, real transformation

**Description:** 6 months to sovereignty

**CTA Button:** Apply Now

**Suggested Visual:** Before/after style graphic with business metrics and lifestyle changes

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Retargeting, high-intent visitors
- Optimization: Purchase
- Budget: $100-200/day

---

## **Ad 4: Retargeting / Belief-Shift Content (No CTA)**

### Primary Text (Short)
**"The lie every female founder believes about rest"**

### Primary Text (Long)
**"The lie every female founder believes about rest"**

"If I stop hustling, I'll discover I'm not actually that talented."

This is the secret fear running 90% of female founders.

So you work 70-hour weeks. Check email at 10pm. Work Sundays while your family asks why.

Because stopping feels dangerous. Like the business might collapse. Like clients might leave. Like you might discover you're a fraud.

But here's the truth nobody tells you:

Talent isn't proven by exhaustion. It's revealed through spaciousness.

When you're constantly in fight-or-flight, you can't access your highest-level thinking. You can't see opportunities. You can't make strategic decisions.

You're operating from your survival brain, not your CEO brain.

I used to drink to sleep every night because I couldn't turn off the anxiety about my business. I thought that meant I was dedicated.

Actually, it meant I was trapped.

The breakthrough came when I realized: My worth isn't tied to my productivity. My talent doesn't require proof through suffering.

Now I take a full day off every week. I work 30 hours instead of 70. And my business makes more than it ever did when I was hustling.

Because I'm finally operating from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

Your talent doesn't need to be proven. It needs to be expressed.

And expression requires space.

**Headline:** You are already enough

**Description:** Time to believe it

**CTA Button:** None (content consumption ad)

**Suggested Visual:** Woman sitting peacefully in nature vs. woman frantically working at laptop

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Website visitors, video viewers, engaged users
- Optimization: Post engagement / video views
- Budget: $30-50/day

---

## **Ad 5: Direct Offer (Application/BOF)**

### Primary Text (Short)
**"Ready to become The Sovereign CEO?"**

### Primary Text (Long)
**"Ready to become The Sovereign CEO?"**

If you're a female founder making $150K-$500K who feels trapped by your own success...

If you're working 70-hour weeks while your competitors charge double and work half as much...

If you're ready to stop running your business from self-abandonment and start leading from self-trust...

The Sovereign CEO program is for you.

This is 6 months of deep identity work using the Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

You'll get:
→ Weekly 1-on-1 sessions with me
→ Monthly group calls with other sovereign leaders
→ Voxer access between sessions
→ Private Circle community
→ Quarterly retreats

The investment is $18,000 for 6 months (or 6 monthly payments of $3,200).

This isn't mindset coaching. This isn't business strategy. This is identity transformation.

By the end of week 4, you'll have your first real "permission to slow down" moment — usually a full day off without guilt.

By month 6, you'll be running a business that serves your life instead of consuming it.

I work with 20 active clients at a time. New cohorts open quarterly. Once we're full, the next doors open 3 months out.

If you're ready to become The Sovereign CEO — a woman who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment — book a call.

This is for women who are done with the hustle playbook and ready for sovereignty.

If that's you, let's talk.

**Headline:** The Sovereign CEO Program

**Description:** 6 months to transformation

**CTA Button:** Apply Now

**Suggested Visual:** Professional photo of Sarah Chen with program overview graphics

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Warm traffic only (retargeting, engaged users)
- Optimization: Purchase
- Budget: $___-300/day
