relationship-dense.content:
# WELCOME EMAIL SEQUENCE
## David Alvarez — Second Act Dating

---

## EMAIL 1: WELCOME + DELIVERY
**Send:** Immediately after opt-in  
**Purpose:** Deliver lead magnet, set expectations, build immediate trust

**Subject Line:** Your Second-Act Dating Audit is here (plus what's coming next)  
**Alt Subject:** Here's your dating audit + the real reason you're still single

**Preview Text:** Most divorced men get this backwards — here's what actually works...

**Body Copy:**

You just downloaded The Second-Act Dating Audit, and I want to make sure you actually use it.

Most divorced men over 45 think their problem is bad photos or a weak bio. They spend months tweaking their profiles and wonder why nothing changes.

Here's what the audit will show you: Your dating app results are a direct reflection of your emotional state, not your marketing strategy.

If you're dating from the wound of your divorce — angry, defensive, trying to prove your ex wrong — you'll attract women who trigger those same patterns. Every time.

But if you're dating from wholeness — clear about who you are and what you want — you'll naturally attract emotionally healthy women who choose you.

The audit walks you through exactly where you are right now and what needs to shift first.

Over the next week, I'm going to share the complete framework that's helped 420 men find lasting relationships after divorce. No pickup artist garbage. No generic dating advice. Just the proven system for rebuilding attachment capacity after divorce.

Tomorrow, I'll tell you about the worst 18 months of my life — and how one conversation changed everything.

Go take the audit now. It takes 5 minutes and will show you exactly why your current approach isn't working.

David

P.S. The audit includes a scoring system that shows you which phase of post-divorce recovery you're in. Most men are shocked by their results.

**CTA:** Take the audit now

---

## EMAIL 2: ORIGIN STORY → HELL ISLAND TO HEAVEN ISLAND
**Send:** Day 1-2  
**Purpose:** Build trust through shared struggle, show transformation is possible

**Subject Line:** The conversation that saved my dating life  
**Alt Subject:** "You're not dating to find a partner..."

**Preview Text:** My mentor's brutal truth about why every relationship was failing

**Body Copy:**

After my divorce in 2014, I spent 18 months dating badly.

I was 38, making $180K as a therapist, and sleeping on a mattress on the floor of a rental apartment.

I was angry. Distrustful. Suspicious of every woman's motives.

I kept attracting women who reminded me of my ex-wife — the same patterns, the same triggers, the same inevitable ending.

I tried everything. Better photos. Clever bio lines. Premium app features. Dating women 15 years younger to avoid "baggage."

Nothing worked.

I felt invisible to quality women. Defeated after every failed first date. Terrified my kids would see me as the broken man who couldn't figure out something as basic as finding a partner.

Then my mentor said something that broke me open:

"You're not dating to find a partner. You're dating to prove your ex wrong. That's why every relationship fails."

He was right.

I wasn't looking for love. I was looking for validation. I wasn't dating from wholeness — I was dating from the wound.

That conversation changed everything.

I did 2 years of my own therapy. Closed my private practice. Launched Second Act Dating specifically for men coming out of divorce.

Today I have a 3000-person community, run 6 retreats per year, and I'm remarried to a woman I met in my own program community.

My kids see me in a healthy relationship. I wake up next to someone who chose me — not settled for me.

The difference wasn't better dating apps or clever pickup lines.

The difference was learning to date from wholeness instead of wounds.

Tomorrow, I'll show you why everything you've been told about post-divorce dating is backwards.

David

**CTA:** Hit reply and tell me — what resonates most about this story?

---

## EMAIL 3: CORE BELIEF #1 — YOUR CURRENT METHOD IS THE PROBLEM
**Send:** Day 3-4  
**Purpose:** Challenge false belief about dating app optimization

**Subject Line:** Why better photos won't save your dating life  
**Alt Subject:** The dating app lie that keeps you single

**Preview Text:** You're fixing the wrong problem (here's what actually matters)

**Body Copy:**

Most divorced men think their dating problem is tactical.

"I need better photos."  
"My bio isn't clever enough."  
"I should upgrade to premium features."

So they spend months optimizing their profiles. They hire photographers. They A/B test headlines. They pay for boosts and super likes.

And they still get the same results.

Here's why: You're trying to fix a leaking roof by repainting the house.

The problem isn't how your house looks from the outside — it's the structural damage that needs repair.

Dating apps are just the paint job. Your attachment patterns are the foundation.

Two men can have identical profiles — same photos, same bio, same everything. But one has done the emotional work to heal from his divorce and understands healthy attachment. The other is still wounded and reactive.

They'll attract completely different types of women.

The difference isn't the marketing. It's the man behind the profile.

Dr. John Gottman's 40+ years of relationship research proves this: emotional intelligence and secure attachment are the strongest predictors of relationship success. Surface-level attraction fades. Emotional attunement creates lasting love.

You already know this works in business. You don't just hire based on resumes — you look for cultural fit, emotional intelligence, long-term potential. You understand that the best business relationships are built on trust and mutual respect, not just surface-level qualifications.

Dating is the same. The right partner chooses you for who you are, not what you look like on paper.

That's why The Second Act Method focuses on rebuilding your attachment capacity first. Everything else is just window dressing.

Tomorrow, I'll show you the real problem that's keeping you stuck — and it's not what you think.

David

**CTA:** Reply and tell me — what's the longest you've spent optimizing a dating profile?

---

## EMAIL 4: CORE BELIEF #2 — THE REAL PROBLEM IS NOT WHAT YOU THINK
**Send:** Day 5-6  
**Purpose:** Redefine the actual problem, introduce the solution

**Subject Line:** The real reason quality women ignore you  
**Alt Subject:** It's not the apps (it's this)

**Preview Text:** The dating pool isn't broken — but your bait is

**Body Copy:**

"Dating apps are completely broken."  
"All the good women are taken."  
"It's just bots and gold diggers now."

I hear this from every divorced man who contacts me.

They blame the apps. The women. The "modern dating culture."

Here's the truth: A fisherman who keeps catching the wrong fish doesn't blame the lake — he changes his bait.

If you keep attracting the same type of woman, the common denominator isn't the dating pool. It's what you're putting out there as bait.

You're not attracting low-quality women because the apps are broken.

You're attracting low-quality women because you're dating from the wound of your divorce instead of from wholeness.

In "Attached," Dr. Amir Levine explains that our attachment style determines who we're drawn to and who's drawn to us. Anxiously attached people attract avoidantly attached partners, creating the same dysfunctional patterns.

Secure attachment attracts secure attachment.

When you're dating from anger, trying to prove your ex wrong, suspicious of every woman's motives — you broadcast wounded energy. And wounded energy attracts wounded people.

But when you date from wholeness — clear about who you are, at peace with your history, confident in your worth — you naturally attract emotionally healthy women.

That's the real problem. Not the apps. Not the women. Your attachment patterns.

The Second Act Method addresses this through a 3-phase Gottman-based protocol:

**Phase 1: Grounding** — 4 weeks of post-divorce identity work to reset your emotional baseline  
**Phase 2: Rebuilding** — 8 weeks of attachment pattern work to establish a new dating frame  
**Phase 3: Attracting** — 12 weeks of real-world dating practice with right-fit women

It's not about getting more matches. It's about attracting the right matches.

Tomorrow, I'll show you proof this actually works — and how fast you can see results.

David

**CTA:** Hit reply — what type of woman do you keep attracting?

---

## EMAIL 5: CORE BELIEF #5 — WHY THIS APPROACH WORKS
**Send:** Day 7-8  
**Purpose:** Provide proof through case studies, establish method credibility

**Subject Line:** From 0 dates to engaged in 8 months  
**Alt Subject:** "The only reason I'm not alone at 52..."

**Preview Text:** Here's what happened when Dr. James K. stopped optimizing his profile

**Body Copy:**

Dr. James K. was a cardiac surgeon who'd been divorced 3 years.

Zero second dates in 18 months.

He had premium subscriptions on every app. Professional photos. A bio written by a dating coach.

Still invisible to quality women.

He was burning money on features that didn't work, feeling defeated after every failed first date, starting to believe he'd die alone at 52.

Then he joined The Second Act Method.

Instead of optimizing his profile, we worked on his attachment patterns. Instead of mass messaging, we focused on emotional intelligence. Instead of chasing chemistry, we taught him to recognize compatibility.

Within the first 30 days, he reported 2-3 meaningful first dates and a noticeable shift in how he showed up emotionally.

By month 8, he was engaged to a woman he met at our November retreat.

"The only reason I'm not alone at 52 is this program."

Carlos M., a restaurant owner, had a different problem. He was divorced 2 years, drinking too much, dating women 15 years younger to avoid his own emotional baggage.

He blamed the "dating scene" for his failures. Kept running from himself.

Through the 6-month program plus 1 retreat, he got sober and started dating an age-appropriate partner. They've been together 9 months and counting.

"I stopped running from myself."

Mike D., a tech founder, avoided dating entirely for 18 months. Too busy building his company. Using work as armor against vulnerability.

After the full program plus 2 retreats, he's in a committed relationship with someone he calls "the right person at the right time."

"I wasn't broken. I was healing."

The difference wasn't their dating profiles. It was their emotional intelligence.

Out of our last 80 clients, 63 achieved meaningful relationship success. The first measurable wins usually show up within the first 30 days when most men report 2-3 meaningful first dates and a noticeable shift in how they show up emotionally.

This isn't pickup artist tactics. It's relationship science applied to post-divorce dating.

Tomorrow, I'll show you what happens if you do nothing — and why that's the most expensive choice of all.

David

P.S. Dr. James K. told me his fiancée said he was "different from other men" she'd met — more present, more emotionally intelligent, more secure in himself. That's what dating from wholeness looks like.

**CTA:** Ready to see similar results? Hit reply and tell me where you're stuck.

---

## EMAIL 6: CORE BELIEF #4 — THE COST OF INACTION + INVESTMENT REFRAME
**Send:** Day 9-10  
**Purpose:** Create urgency through cost of inaction, reframe investment

**Subject Line:** The $___mistake most divorced men make  
**Alt Subject:** What doing nothing actually costs you

**Preview Text:** It's not just money — it's years of your life you can't get back

**Body Copy:**

Let me ask you something.

How much are you spending right now on dating?

Premium app subscriptions. Professional photos. Dating coaches who teach you "text game." Therapy sessions to process your divorce.

Most divorced men burn $400-600 monthly on this stuff.

That's $___per year. Plus the emotional cost of another year dating from the wound instead of from wholeness.

But here's what really costs you:

Time.

You're 45, 50, maybe 55. Every year you spend dating badly is a year you can't get back. Every failed relationship is another year your kids see you as the broken man who can't figure out love.

Every morning you wake up alone in that empty bed is a reminder that you're not living the life you want.

The pendulum law says this: the longer you stay stuck, the further you swing into frustration. The anger gets deeper. The cynicism gets harder to shake. The right women become harder to recognize because you've trained yourself to expect disappointment.

Meanwhile, your ex moves on. Posts photos with her new partner. Your kids see her in a healthy relationship while you're still swiping on apps.

Here's the math: $9,500 for The Second Act Method versus $400-600 monthly indefinitely, plus the opportunity cost of years spent in unsuccessful dating patterns.

The program pays for itself in ___ just from the money you stop wasting. But the real ROI is this: you find your person instead of dying alone in your apartment.

You wake up next to someone who chose you. Your kids see you in a healthy relationship. You stop feeling invisible to quality women because you finally know who you are.

The biggest risk isn't investing in yourself. The biggest risk is doing nothing and staying exactly where you are.

Because where you are right now — invisible, angry, defeated, suspicious of every woman's motives — that's not getting better by itself.

Tomorrow, I'll show you exactly how to take the next step if you're ready to become the man who attracts the right women.

David

P.S. I remarried in 2021 to a woman I met in my own program community. The best investment I ever made wasn't in dating apps or pickup courses. It was in learning to date from wholeness instead of wounds.

**CTA:** Hit reply and tell me — what's staying stuck really costing you?

---

## EMAIL 7: THE INVITATION → ASPIRING IDENTITY SELL
**Send:** Day 11-12  
**Purpose:** Full offer presentation, sell the identity transformation

**Subject Line:** Ready to become The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man?  
**Alt Subject:** This is for men who are done settling

**Preview Text:** If you're ready to attract women who choose you, here's how...

**Body Copy:**

There are two types of divorced men over 45.

The first type stays stuck. He burns money on dating apps, complains that "all the good women are taken," and slowly becomes bitter about modern dating. His kids see him as the guy who couldn't figure out love. He dies alone in his apartment, wondering what went wrong.

The second type does the work. He invests in himself, learns to date from wholeness instead of wounds, and attracts emotionally healthy women who choose him. His kids see him in a loving relationship. He becomes The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man.

Which type are you?

If you're ready to be the second type, here's how The Second Act Method works:

**6 months. 3 phases. Complete transformation.**

**Phase 1: Grounding** (4 weeks) — Post-divorce identity work to reset your emotional baseline  
**Phase 2: Rebuilding** (8 weeks) — Attachment pattern work to establish a new dating frame  
**Phase 3: Attracting** (12 weeks) — Real-world dating practice with right-fit women

You get weekly group coaching calls with men on the same journey. Monthly 1-on-1 sessions to work through your specific challenges. Access to the 3000-person Brotherhood community. Profile and text review from someone who understands post-divorce dating. Quarterly weekend retreats to practice these skills in real-world settings.

Everything is based on Dr. John Gottman's relationship research — not pickup artist garbage.

The investment is $9,500 for 6 months (or 3 payments of $3,300).

**This is NOT for you if:**
- You're looking for pickup tactics to date women half your age
- You think the problem is just your photos and want a quick fix
- You're not ready to do emotional work and just want someone to blame
- You make under $200K and can't invest in real transformation

**This IS for you if:**
- You're 45-60, divorced for at least 1 year, and tired of dating the same type of woman
- You make $200K+ but feel invisible to quality women who match your success
- You're ready to admit that swiping harder isn't the solution
- You want a real partner who chooses you, not someone who settles
- You're man enough to do the inner work most divorced guys avoid

The next step is a discovery call where we'll discuss your specific situation and see if The Second Act Method is right for you.

But here's the thing — I only work with men who are serious about becoming The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man. Men who are done making excuses and ready to do the work.

If that's you, book the call.

If not, that's fine too. But don't complain about being invisible to quality women if you're not willing to do what it takes to change.

The choice is yours.

David

P.S. Dr. James K. went from 0 second dates in 18 months to engaged in 8 months. Carlos M. got sober and found an age-appropriate partner. Mike D. stopped avoiding dating and found "the right person at the right time." They all became The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man. Your turn.

**CTA:** Book your discovery call now → [BOOKING LINK]

## David Alvarez — Second Act Dating

---

David Alvarez

- The exact process me and my clients used to find loving relationships and stop dating from the wound of divorce and feeling invisible to quality women for good

But here's what the audit doesn't cover...

--- Click here to Get Your Audit Now ---
[INSERT DOWNLOAD LINK]

## Email 3: Core Belief Teaching
**Send:** Day 2

**Subject Line:** Why successful men stay invisible to quality women
**Alternative:** The truth about dating apps (it's not what you think)

**Preview Text:** Most divorced men believe this lie about finding love...

**Body Copy:**

Hey %FIRSTNAME%,

Here's the #1 Truth about getting your emotional baseline reset, establishing a new dating frame, and having consistent dates with right-fit women — and ultimately becoming The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man — that is the difference between dying alone in your apartment and finding a partner who chooses you without settling or performing.

It's like this: You wouldn't try to fix a leaking roof by repainting the house. The problem isn't how your house looks from the outside — it's the structural damage that needs repair. Dating apps are just the paint job. Your attachment patterns are the foundation.

See, most divorced men age 45-60 who make $200K+ believe "Better dating app optimization and more matches is the path to finding a loving relationship," so they do mass messaging on apps and premium subscription stacking, and you've already proven that those don't work.

The truth is: The Second Act Method — a 3-phase Gottman-based protocol for rebuilding attachment capacity after divorce — is the proven path to finding a loving relationship.

Dr. John Gottman's 40+ years of relationship research shows that emotional intelligence and secure attachment are the strongest predictors of relationship success. His studies of thousands of couples prove that surface-level attraction fades, but emotional attunement creates lasting love.

Click here to learn how to never have to deal with dating from wounds, attracting wrong women, feeling invisible and defeated, or do mass messaging and premium subscription stacking ever again.

Tomorrow, I'll show you why "broken dating apps" isn't actually your problem...

David

P.S. Want my personal help to find a partner who chooses you in 6 months? I'll explain how that works soon.

## Email 4: The Real Problem
**Send:** Day 3

**Subject Line:** It's not the dating apps (here's what it really is)
**Alternative:** The real reason you keep attracting the wrong women

**Preview Text:** Most men think their problem is bad matches. It's not...

**Body Copy:**

Hey %FIRSTNAME%,

Most divorced men age 45-60 who make $200K+ think their problem is broken dating apps and low-quality women. It's not.

You can swipe endlessly and pay for premium subscriptions all day, but if you don't understand and apply what I'm about to share with you, you'll never find a partner who chooses you.

Here's why... dating app optimization focuses on attraction but ignores attachment patterns. It treats symptoms like bad matches and poor response rates instead of the root cause — dating from the wound of your divorce.

It's like this: A fisherman who keeps catching the wrong fish doesn't blame the lake — he changes his bait. If you keep attracting the same type of woman, the common denominator isn't the dating pool. It's what you're putting out there as bait.

See, most divorced men think "I just need better matches — the problem is the quality of women on apps," so they do mass messaging and premium subscription stacking, and you've already proven that those don't work.

The truth is: you're dating from the wound of your divorce instead of from wholeness.

In "Attached," Dr. Amir Levine explains that our attachment style determines who we're drawn to and who's drawn to us. Anxiously attached people attract avoidantly attached partners, creating the same dysfunctional patterns. Secure attachment attracts secure attachment.

As long as you keep treating the symptom (bad matches), you'll keep getting the same results (first dates that go nowhere).

So what's the actual solution? I'll break it down starting tomorrow...

David

P.S. Want my personal help to find a partner who chooses you in 6 months? Keep reading these emails — I'll explain everything soon.

**CTA:** Promise of solution tomorrow
**P.S.:** Continue building anticipation

**Send:** Day 4

**Alternative:** How to stop dating from your wound

And we've found that the best way to do that is with 4 weeks of post-divorce identity work.

We do this by Grounding in a way that easily, quickly avoids dating from reactive wounds and gets you emotionally grounded and ready for healthy connection.

Here's what this looks like: Instead of jumping back into dating while you're still angry at your ex, you spend 4 weeks identifying your attachment patterns and processing your divorce trauma. You learn to recognize your triggers before they sabotage promising connections.

Most men skip this step. They think they can white-knuckle their way through the emotional work. That's why they keep attracting women who remind them of their ex-wife.

One client told me: "I thought I was over my divorce because I wasn't crying anymore. Turns out I was just numb. Grounding taught me the difference between healing and hiding."

This is step 1 of 3 — there's a complete system here.

I explain it all in the video linked below...

--- Click here to Watch Now ---

Phase 1 gets you emotionally stable. But Phase 2 is where things really accelerate...

David

P.S. Want my personal help to find a partner who chooses you in 6 months? Keep reading — I'll share how we can work together soon.

**Send:** Day 5

**Alternative:** How to establish your new dating frame

**Preview Text:** This is where most men get stuck without a system...

**Body Copy:**

Hey %FIRSTNAME%,

Yesterday, I sent you an email about how to get your emotional baseline reset through Grounding.

But if you don't get emotionally grounded, you'll keep attracting women who trigger the same patterns that destroyed your marriage.

But getting your emotional baseline reset isn't enough.

If you want to find a partner who chooses you, you'll also need to establish your new dating frame.

Now, we do this by 8 weeks of attachment pattern work in a way that easily, quickly avoids recreating dysfunctional relationship patterns and gets you clear on what you actually need in a partner.

It's the same attachment work I've used personally to establish my new dating frame, and I explain it all in the video linked below...

Here's why this matters: Most men think they know what they want in a partner. But they're still operating from their wounded attachment style. They say they want someone "independent" but they're actually looking for someone who won't trigger their abandonment fears.

Rebuilding teaches you to identify emotionally healthy women and present your authentic self. You stop confusing chemistry with compatibility.

This isn't about working more hours on dating — it's about working on the RIGHT things. The men who skip this phase keep ending up with the same type of woman over and over.

--- Click here to Watch Now ---

Tomorrow, I'll show you the final piece — Phase 3 is what separates The Wound-Dating Dad from The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man...

David

Hey %FIRSTNAME%,

When all three phases work together, you're no longer dating from the wound of your divorce. You're dating from wholeness. You attract women who choose you because you finally know who you are.

Now, I've given you the framework. But there's a difference between knowing the path and walking it.

That's exactly why I built The Second Act Method — a comprehensive 6-month program that guides divorced men through all three phases with expert support and a community of men on the same journey.

This isn't for everyone — tomorrow I'll explain who it IS for.

I explain how it all comes together in the video linked below...

--- Click here to Watch Now ---

David

### Video 1
**Title:** "Why Divorced Men Over 45 Keep Dating the Same Type of Woman (And How to Break the Pattern)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to stop attracting women who remind you of your ex without settling for someone you're not attracted to, so you can find a partner who chooses you and feel confident in your ability to recognize healthy love."
**Target Belief:** Belief #2 (Real Problem)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think you need better matches, but you're actually dating from the wound of your divorce, which attracts wounded women
2. **New Belief:** You attract what you are, not what you want — heal your attachment patterns and you'll attract healthy women
3. **Proof:** Dr. James K. kept attracting unavailable women until he learned The Second Act Method and got engaged to someone he met at our retreat

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how The Second Act Method can help you break these patterns

### Video 2
**Title:** "The $9,500 Investment That Saves Divorced Men Thousands (Real Cost Breakdown)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to stop burning money on dating apps and failed relationships without being cheap about finding love, so you can invest wisely in your future and feel confident about your financial decisions."
**Target Belief:** Belief #4 (Money Allocation)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think $9,500 is expensive, but you're already burning roughly $400-600 monthly on ineffective approaches
2. **New Belief:** The Second Act Method is an investment that pays for itself by ending the expensive cycle of failed dating
3. **Proof:** Carlos M. was spending more than that annually on apps and therapy before investing in the program and finding his person

**CTA:** Calculate your current dating costs and book a call to see how the program saves money long-term

### Video 3
**Title:** "Why Group Coaching Works Better Than Individual Therapy for Divorced Men"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to get better results with other men who understand your journey without feeling like your situation is too unique for group work, so you can accelerate your progress and feel supported by men who get it."
**Target Belief:** Belief #6 (Help & Support)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think group programs won't work because your situation feels unique, but isolation keeps you stuck in shame
2. **New Belief:** Learning with other divorced men accelerates progress because you realize you're not alone and can learn from their breakthroughs
3. **Proof:** Mike D. avoided dating for 18 months trying to figure it out alone, but found his person within 11 months of joining the Brotherhood

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how the group dynamic accelerates individual transformation

### Video 4
**Title:** "The 3-Phase System That Gets Divorced Men From Wounded to Whole in 6 Months"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to heal from your divorce and attract healthy women without years of therapy, so you can become The Emotionally Intelligent Second-Act Man and feel ready for real love."
**Target Belief:** Belief #5 (Method Effectiveness)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think therapy and dating coaching separately will eventually work, but fragmented approaches don't address the root cause
2. **New Belief:** The Second Act Method integrates emotional healing with practical dating skills in one comprehensive system
3. **Proof:** Within the first 30 days, most men report 2-3 meaningful first dates and a noticeable shift in how they show up emotionally

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how the integrated approach works for your specific situation

### Video 5
**Title:** "Why 'I'll Start Dating When Work Slows Down' Is Killing Your Love Life"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to prioritize finding love without sacrificing your career success, so you can have both professional achievement and personal fulfillment and feel complete as a man."
**Target Belief:** Belief #3 (Time Priority)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think work has to come first and relationships can wait, but this creates endless postponement and uses career as emotional avoidance
2. **New Belief:** The right relationship enhances every area of your life, including your career — successful men make time for what matters most
3. **Proof:** Harvard's Grant Study shows relationships are the strongest predictor of life satisfaction, stronger than career success or wealth

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how to integrate relationship building into your successful life

### Video 6
**Title:** "The Gottman Method: Why Science-Based Dating Beats Pickup Artist Tactics"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to attract quality women using relationship science without manipulation tactics, so you can build genuine connections and feel authentic in your dating approach."
**Target Belief:** Belief #1 (Core Belief)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think better dating app optimization and pickup techniques will get you results, but surface tactics repel emotionally healthy women
2. **New Belief:** Dr. John Gottman's research proves emotional intelligence and secure attachment create lasting attraction
3. **Proof:** The Second Act Method uses Gottman-based protocols that helped 420 men find genuine relationships, not just hookups

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how relationship science applies to your dating life

### Video 7
**Title:** "From Invisible to Irresistible: How Divorced Men Transform Their Dating Presence"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to stop feeling invisible to quality women without becoming someone you're not, so you can attract the right partner and feel confident in your authentic self."
**Target Belief:** Belief #2 (Real Problem)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think quality women don't notice you because of your age or divorce status, but you're actually invisible because you're dating from wounds
2. **New Belief:** When you heal and show up from wholeness, you naturally attract women who are doing their own work
3. **Proof:** Dr. James K. felt invisible for 18 months until he learned to date from emotional intelligence and got engaged

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to discover what's really making you invisible to the women you want

### Video 8
**Title:** "Why Waiting for the 'Perfect Time' to Date Is Costing You Your Person"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to start dating from readiness instead of perfection without rushing into the wrong relationship, so you can find your person while you're still in your prime and feel excited about your future."
**Target Belief:** Belief #3 (Time Priority)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You think you need to be completely healed before dating, but perfectionism is fear disguised as wisdom
2. **New Belief:** The right time is now — healing happens through healthy relationships, not before them
3. **Proof:** Carlos M. waited 2 years thinking he needed to fix himself first, but found healing and love simultaneously through the program

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how to date while healing instead of waiting for perfect readiness

### Video 9
**Title:** "The Real Reason Your Ex Moved On First (And How to Use It as Fuel)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to channel your anger about your ex's new relationship without letting it sabotage your dating, so you can find someone better and feel at peace with your past."
**Target Belief:** Belief #2 (Real Problem)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You're angry that your ex moved on first and it's affecting your dating confidence, but this anger reveals you're still dating to prove her wrong
2. **New Belief:** Your ex moving on is actually freedom — now you can date for the right reasons instead of reactive ones
3. **Proof:** My mentor told me "You're not dating to find a partner, you're dating to prove your ex wrong" — that breakthrough led to meeting my wife

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn how to transform your anger into attraction power

### Video 10
**Title:** "How to Spot Red Flags in the First 10 Minutes (Attachment Style Decoder)"
**Hook:** "In this video, I'm going to show you how to identify emotionally healthy women early without being paranoid or judgmental, so you can avoid wrong relationships and feel confident in your partner selection."
**Target Belief:** Belief #5 (Method Effectiveness)
**3-Point Outline:**
1. **Problem:** You can't tell who's serious about relationships versus who's just looking for attention, leading to wasted time on wrong women
2. **New Belief:** Attachment theory gives you a framework to assess emotional health and relationship readiness quickly
3. **Proof:** The Second Act Method teaches Gottman-based assessment skills that help you recognize secure attachment patterns

**CTA:** Book a discovery call to learn the specific red flags and green flags to look for

---

## SECTION 4: SHORT-FORM HOOKS (20 scroll-stopping hooks)

| # | Hook | Target Belief |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | "Your dating results are a mirror of your emotional state — wounded men attract wounded women." | Belief #2 |
| 2 | "If you hesitate to invest $9,500 in finding love, you're teaching women to hesitate about you." | Belief #4 |

relationship-dense.content:
# INSTAGRAM DM AUTOMATION SEQUENCE
## David Alvarez — Second Act Dating

---

#### STEP 1: Welcome & Qualification Start

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact sends any DM to the business account

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds with any message: → Go to Step 2
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: dm-sequence-started] | [+Add: cold-lead]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: New Lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey there! Thanks for reaching out. 

I help divorced men over 45 find loving relationships without repeating the patterns that broke the first one. 

Quick question — are you currently single and looking to get back into dating, or are you in a relationship right now?

---

#### STEP 2: Qualification Question 1 - Relationship Status

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies to Step 1

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact mentions "single" or "divorced" or "looking": → Go to Step 3
> - IF contact mentions "relationship" or "married": → Go to Step 16 (Not Qualified)
> - IF unclear response: → Go to Step 17 (Clarification)
> - IF no response after 4 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: q1-answered]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Qualifying]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Got it. And how long have you been divorced? 

I ask because the guys who get the best results in my program have been single for at least a year but not more than 4 years. They're past the initial shock but haven't given up hope yet.

---

#### STEP 3: Qualification Question 2 - Time Since Divorce

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates they're single/divorced in Step 2

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF mentions 1-4 years: → Go to Step 4
> - IF mentions less than 1 year: → Go to Step 18 (Too Recent)
> - IF mentions more than 4 years: → Go to Step 4 (Continue but note)
> - IF no response after 4 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: q2-answered]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

And what's your current experience been like with dating apps? 

Most of the men I work with tell me they're getting matches but can't seem to get past first dates, or they're attracting women who remind them of their ex. Sound familiar?

---

#### STEP 4: Qualification Question 3 - Dating App Experience

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact answers time since divorce in Step 3

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF mentions frustration/no success/same patterns: → Go to Step 5
> - IF mentions some success but wants improvement: → Go to Step 5
> - IF mentions no dating app experience: → Go to Step 5
> - IF no response after 4 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: q3-answered]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Here's what I'm really curious about — when you think about your ideal relationship, what would that look like? 

I ask because most guys say they want "someone who gets them" but they're actually dating to prove their ex wrong instead of finding the right partner.

---

#### STEP 5: Qualification Question 4 - Relationship Vision

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact answers dating app experience in Step 4

**Time Delay:** Wait 4 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF mentions genuine partnership/connection: → Go to Step 6
> - IF mentions proving ex wrong/revenge dating: → Go to Step 6
> - IF mentions surface-level desires only: → Go to Step 6
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: q4-answered]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Last question — if you found a proven system that could help you attract the right woman within 6 months, what would that be worth to you? 

Not asking you to buy anything right now. Just want to understand if you're the type of guy who invests in solutions or if you prefer to figure things out on your own.

---

#### STEP 6: Qualification Question 5 - Investment Mindset

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact answers relationship vision in Step 5

**Time Delay:** Wait 5 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF mentions willingness to invest/get help: → Go to Step 7
> - IF mentions DIY approach only: → Go to Step 19 (Not Ready)
> - IF mentions budget concerns: → Go to Step 7 (Address later)
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: q5-answered] | [+Add: qualified-lead]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Qualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Based on what you've told me, you sound exactly like the type of man I can help.

Here's the thing — you're not broken. You're just dating from the wound of your divorce instead of from wholeness. That's why you keep attracting the same type of woman or feeling invisible to the ones you actually want.

I've got a proven system called The Second Act Method that's helped 420 men find loving relationships. Want to hear how it works?

---

#### STEP 7: Problem Agitation & Solution Tease

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows investment mindset in Step 6

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact says "yes" or shows interest: → Go to Step 8
> - IF contact says "no" or seems hesitant: → Go to Step 20 (Objection Handle)
> - IF no response after 4 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: interest-shown]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

The Second Act Method is a 3-phase system based on Dr. John Gottman's relationship research. 

Phase 1: Grounding — 4 weeks of post-divorce identity work to reset your emotional baseline
Phase 2: Rebuilding — 8 weeks of attachment pattern work to establish a new dating frame  
Phase 3: Attracting — 12 weeks of real-world practice to get consistent dates with right-fit women

Most men see their first meaningful dates within 30 days and a noticeable shift in how they show up emotionally.

---

#### STEP 8: Solution Overview

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows interest in hearing about the solution in Step 7

**Time Delay:** Wait 4 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact asks questions or shows interest: → Go to Step 9
> - IF contact seems skeptical: → Go to Step 21 (Address Skepticism)
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: solution-presented]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Here's what makes this different from therapy or generic dating advice:

✓ It's specifically designed for successful men coming out of divorce
✓ You're learning alongside other guys going through the same thing
✓ It combines emotional healing with practical dating skills
✓ You get both group coaching and 1-on-1 support
✓ Plus access to our 3000-person Brotherhood community

The guys who do best are making $200K+ and ready to do the inner work. They're tired of burning $400-600 monthly on apps that don't work.

Sound like you?

---

#### STEP 9: Qualification Confirmation & Social Proof

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact engages with solution overview in Step 8

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact confirms fit: → Go to Step 10
> - IF contact has concerns about income/time: → Go to Step 22 (Address Concerns)
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: fit-confirmed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Let me share what happened with Dr. James K. — cardiac surgeon, divorced 3 years, hadn't had a second date in 18 months.

He was spending thousands on premium dating subscriptions and feeling invisible to quality women. Starting to believe he'd die alone at 52.

After 6 months in the program, he got engaged to a woman he met at one of our retreats. 

As he told me: "The only reason I'm not alone at 52 is this program."

Want to know how we can get you similar results?

---

#### STEP 10: Case Study & Transition to Call

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact confirms they're a fit in Step 9

**Time Delay:** Wait 4 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact wants to know more: → Go to Step 11
> - IF contact seems ready to move forward: → Go to Step 11
> - IF contact has objections: → Go to Step 23 (Handle Objections)
> - IF no response after 6 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: case-study-shared]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Here's the thing — I can't diagnose your specific situation or create a custom plan through Instagram messages.

But I can offer you a 30-minute discovery call where we'll:

→ Map out exactly where you're stuck in your dating life
→ Identify the specific patterns keeping you single  
→ Show you the fastest path to finding your person
→ See if The Second Act Method is right for you

No pressure, no hard sell. Just an honest conversation about your dating life.

Worth 30 minutes?

---

#### STEP 11: Discovery Call Offer

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows interest in learning more in Step 10

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact says yes to call: → Go to Step 12
> - IF contact hesitates or has concerns: → Go to Step 24 (Address Call Hesitation)
> - IF no response after 8 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-offered]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Here's the link to book a time that works for you:

https://secondactdating.com/program

A couple things before we talk:

1. Come ready to be honest about your dating history — the good, bad, and ugly
2. Have 30 minutes where you won't be interrupted  
3. Be prepared to make a decision if it's a fit

I only work with men who are serious about finding love, not guys who want to "think about it" for 6 months.

Fair enough?

---

#### STEP 12: Booking Link & Expectations

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact agrees to discovery call in Step 11

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact confirms understanding: → Go to Step 13
> - IF contact books immediately: → Go to Step 14 (Booking Confirmation)
> - IF contact has questions about the call: → Go to Step 25 (Call FAQ)
> - IF no response after 12 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: booking-link-sent]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Call Scheduled]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

One more thing — I'm only taking on 40 active clients right now, and we're at 38. 

If you're serious about this, don't wait. The next cohort doesn't start until next quarter.

Also, if you book in the next 48 hours, I'll include access to our private Brotherhood community even before you officially start the program.

But that's only if you book and show up to the call.

Questions?

---

#### STEP 13: Urgency & Fast Action Bonus

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact confirms understanding of call expectations in Step 12

**Time Delay:** Wait 5 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact books call: → Go to Step 14
> - IF contact asks questions: → Go to Step 25 (Call FAQ)
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 26 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: urgency-presented]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Looking forward to our conversation. 

In the meantime, if you want to get a head start, check out The Second-Act Dating Audit at https://secondactdating.com/audit

It'll help you identify exactly what's keeping you stuck before we talk.

Talk soon,
David

---

#### STEP 14: Booking Confirmation & Pre-Call Resource

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact books discovery call

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - No further automation needed - contact moves to call sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-booked] | [+Add: hot-lead] | [-Remove: cold-lead]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Call Booked]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect! I see you booked our call. 

You should receive a calendar confirmation with all the details. 

Make sure to complete The Second-Act Dating Audit before we talk — it'll make our conversation much more productive.

See you soon,
David

---

#### STEP 15: Re-engagement (No Response)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact hasn't responded within specified timeframes in previous steps

**Time Delay:** Wait 24 hours from last message

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Return to appropriate step based on context
> - IF no response after 48 hours: → Go to Step 27 (Final Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: re-engagement-sent]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey — I know Instagram messages can get buried.

Just wanted to circle back because you seemed genuinely interested in finding a solution to your dating situation.

If you're still looking to find a loving relationship without repeating the patterns that broke your first one, I'm here to help.

Just reply "READY" and I'll get you the details.

---

#### STEP 16: Not Qualified - In Relationship

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates they're currently in a relationship in Step 2

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Sequence ends here

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: not-qualified-relationship] | [-Remove: cold-lead]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Not Qualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Got it — sounds like you're in a good place relationship-wise right now.

My program is specifically for divorced men who are single and looking to get back into dating.

If your situation changes or you have friends who might benefit from what I do, feel free to send them my way.

Best of luck!

---

#### STEP 17: Clarification - Unclear Response

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact gives unclear response about relationship status in Step 2

**Time Delay:** Wait 5 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact clarifies they're single: → Go to Step 3
> - IF contact clarifies they're in relationship: → Go to Step 16
> - IF still unclear after 4 hours: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: clarification-needed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Just to clarify — are you currently single and looking to date, or are you in a relationship right now?

I want to make sure I'm giving you the right information based on your situation.

---

#### STEP 18: Too Recent Divorce

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates divorce was less than 1 year ago in Step 3

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Sequence ends here, but leaves door open for future

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: too-recent-divorce] | [+Add: future-prospect]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Future Prospect]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I appreciate you being honest about your timeline.

Here's the thing — guys who are less than a year out from divorce usually aren't emotionally ready for the work we do. You're still processing the divorce itself.

I'd recommend giving yourself another 6 months to heal, then reach out. 

In the meantime, grab The Second-Act Dating Audit at https://secondactdating.com/audit — it'll help you prepare for when you're ready.

---

#### STEP 19: Not Ready for Investment

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates DIY approach only in Step 6

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Sequence ends here

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: not-ready-investment] | [-Remove: cold-lead]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Not Qualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I totally get that. Some guys prefer to figure things out on their own.

Here's the reality though — if you could solve this yourself, you probably would have by now. Most successful men know when to get expert help.

If you change your mind and want to stop wasting time on trial and error, I'm here.

The Second-Act Dating Audit is free: https://secondactdating.com/audit

---

#### STEP 20: Handle Initial Hesitation

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact seems hesitant about hearing the solution in Step 7

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact engages: → Go to Step 8
> - IF contact remains hesitant: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: initial-hesitation]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I get it — you've probably heard a lot of dating advice that doesn't work.

Here's what's different: I'm not some 25-year-old pickup artist. I'm a divorced dad who went through this exact journey and figured out what actually works.

420 men later, I've got the system dialed in.

Worth hearing about?

---

#### STEP 21: Address Skepticism

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact seems skeptical about the solution in Step 8

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact engages: → Go to Step 9
> - IF skepticism continues: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: skeptical]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Look, I don't blame you for being skeptical. Most dating advice is garbage.

But here's the thing — I'm not teaching you pickup lines or how to slide into DMs.

I'm teaching you how to heal from your divorce and attract emotionally healthy women. That's relationship science, not dating tricks.

Dr. John Gottman has 40+ years of research backing this approach.

Make sense?

---

#### STEP 22: Address Income/Time Concerns

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact has concerns about income or time requirements in Step 9

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF concerns addressed: → Go to Step 10
> - IF concerns persist: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: income-time-concerns]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I hear you on the time piece. Here's the reality — you're already spending time on dating. You're just not getting results.

This is about working smarter, not harder. 

One group call per week and some focused action between calls. Most guys find it actually saves them time because they stop spinning their wheels.

As for investment — what's another year of being single worth to you? Most guys spend more than this on failed dating attempts.

---

#### STEP 23: Handle Objections

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact has objections in Step 10

**Time Delay:** Wait 3 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF objection handled: → Go to Step 11
> - IF objection persists: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: objection-raised]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

What's your biggest concern about moving forward?

Is it the time commitment? The investment? Whether it'll actually work for your situation?

I'd rather address it head-on than have you wondering.

---

#### STEP 24: Address Call Hesitation

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact hesitates about discovery call in Step 11

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF hesitation resolved: → Go to Step 12
> - IF still hesitant: → Go to Step 15 (Re-engagement)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-hesitation]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I get it — you don't know me yet and phone calls can feel like pressure.

Here's the thing: I'm not going to try to sell you something that's not right for you. I only work with guys who are genuinely ready to change their dating life.

If that's not you, we'll figure that out in 10 minutes and I'll point you toward some free resources.

If it is you, we'll map out exactly how to get you there.

Either way, you'll have clarity. Fair?

---

#### STEP 25: Call FAQ

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact has questions about the discovery call in Step 12 or 13

**Time Delay:** Wait 2 minutes

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF questions answered: → Go to Step 13 or 14 (depending on context)
> - IF more questions: → Continue answering

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: call-questions]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

What specifically do you want to know about the call?

It's 30 minutes, no pressure, and designed to see if we're a mutual fit. I'll ask about your dating history, what you've tried, and what you want your love life to look like.

If it makes sense to work together, I'll explain how. If not, I'll give you some free resources and send you on your way.

What else?

---

#### STEP 26: Follow-up After Urgency

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response 24 hours after Step 13

**Time Delay:** Wait 24 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Go to Step 14 or address their response
> - IF no response after 48 hours: → Go to Step 27

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: urgency-follow-up]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Quick reminder — we're down to the last 2 spots for this cohort.

If you're serious about finding love in the next 6 months instead of wasting another year on dating apps, book that call today.

The link again: https://secondactdating.com/program

Don't let this opportunity pass you by.

---

#### STEP 27: Final Follow-up

**Trigger Condition:**
> No response 48 hours after re-engagement attempts

**Time Delay:** Wait 48 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF contact responds: → Return to appropriate step
> - IF no response: → End sequence, tag as cold

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: final-follow-up] | [+Add: cold-prospect]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Cold]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Last message from me — I don't want to be that guy who keeps messaging when you're not interested.

If you ever decide you're ready to stop dating from the wound of your divorce and start attracting the right woman, you know where to find me.

The Second-Act Dating Audit is always available at https://secondactdating.com/audit

Best of luck with everything.
